---
title: "FengLab"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

# Understanding human immunity across age, infection, and disease

The FengLab combines single-cell multi-omics, high-dimensional proteomics, computational biology, and translational research to investigate how human immune systems develop, respond to infection, and change across the lifespan.

[Explore our research](research.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Meet the team](people.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Research areas

### Single-cell multi-omics

We use integrated transcriptomic, epigenomic, proteomic, and immune-receptor measurements to characterize complex immune responses.

### Human immunology

We study immune variation across individuals, developmental stages, clinical cohorts, and disease states.

### Infection and prevention

We investigate immune responses to infection, vaccination, and preventive interventions.

## Latest news

News and laboratory updates will appear here.

## Selected publications

Selected publications will appear here.
